working: analyze_audio.py: analyze_stereo_and_tonal() appended before final print
stereo_width: 0.0-1.0 ratio (side_rms / mid_rms) — tested: 0.1324 on mix WAV
tonal_balance: {bass, low_mid, high_mid, air} as fraction of total FFT energy
stereo_width_per_band: M/S ratio per frequency band
Wrapped in try/except — all 4 fields null on failure, error to stderr

REQUIRES MANUAL SQL: ALTER TABLE projects ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reference_links jsonb DEFAULT '[]';
Spotify user token is in-memory only — resets on watcher restart; re-authorize via http://localhost:4242/spotify-auth after restart
